name: Irc.App
comment:
elm-irc client library, the Elm Architecture wrapper
@docs program

values.name: program
values.comment: A specilized version of `Html.App.program` that features the extra `onIrc` callback
values.type: { cfg : Config, init : model, onIrc : Message -> model -> CommandSet a -> ( model, Cmd (Msg x) ), update : x -> model -> CommandSet a -> ( model, Cmd (Msg x) ), view : model -> Html x } -> Program Never

name: Irc
comment:
elm-irc library, the core component
@docs process, listen

values.name: process
values.comment: let the IRC client itself react to a particular message

name: Irc.Commands
comment:
elm-irc library, commands to be sent to the IRC server
@docs commands, stringify, CommandSet

aliases.name: CommandSet
aliases.comment: a set of commands for a particular server
aliases.type: { join : String -> Cmd msg, nick : String -> Cmd msg, raw : String -> List String -> Cmd msg, kick : String -> String -> Maybe String -> Cmd msg, register : User -> Cmd msg, query : String -> String -> Cmd msg, message : String -> String -> Cmd msg, part : String -> Maybe String -> Cmd msg, pong : String -> Cmd msg, topic : String -> Maybe String -> Cmd msg }

values.name: commands
values.comment: generate command variants for a particular server configuration

values.name: stringify
values.comment: serialize individual IRC data to a raw string

name: Irc.Types
comment:
elm-irc library, types and definitions
@docs Config, User, Message

unions.name: Message
cases: { from : User, to : String, text : String }
{ from : User, channel : String, text : String }
{ who : User, channel : String, reason : Maybe String }
{ who : User, channel : String, text : Maybe String }
{ who : User, whom : String, channel : String, reason : Maybe String }

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { proxy : String, server : String, user : User }

aliases.name: User
aliases.type: { nick : String, username : String, fullname : String }
